summary: Prepared an evidence checklist and red-team gate proposal for the L109 report pack. The proposal keeps L108 labeled as diagnostic-only, source-exposed, and non-comparable to the strict scoreboard, while preserving the strict scoreboard reference of L37 EDD 86.25.

accepted_fields_or_changes: Record L108 as diagnostic-only, source-exposed evidence, not a fresh validation claim.
State that the L108 no-judge EDD 51.0 is not comparable to judged runs and must stay separate from the strict scoreboard.
Keep the strict scoreboard reference explicit: L37 EDD 86.25 remains the baseline comparison point.
Use concise cause/result/insight/next-basis bullets for L108 and the expected L109 follow-up.
Keep field_score as a diagnostic axis beside EDD, not inside EDD.
Require red-team gates for over-refusal, unsafe exposure, and guard false positives before any high-score claim is promoted.
rejected_or_risky_items: Do not describe L108 as comparable to strict validation or as a generalization win.
Do not let no-judge or diagnostic-only EDD values replace the strict scoreboard narrative.
Do not merge field-level contact/privacy outcomes into aggregate EDD.
Do not claim high-score improvement without an explicit note that the set is source-exposed or holdout-free.
Do not omit the false-positive red-team gate for guards that can overblock normal supported questions.
needs_orchestrator_review: Confirm the L109 report pack wording preserves the diagnostic-only vs strict-scoreboard split.
Confirm the L109 gate language includes both over-refusal and unsafe-exposure checks for mixed official/private contact questions.
Confirm the report does not imply that L108 or L109 can be compared directly with the strict scoreboard without a fresh untouched validation set.

observed_results: L106-L107 report says L105 is saturated diagnostic evidence and the next useful work is overfit control plus field-level scoring.
L108 details show baseline_default EDD 51.0 with false_abstention_rate 0.6, groundedness/relevance null, and field_score attached only for mixed official/private contact cases.
L108 case data shows the mixed budget-vs-contract and evaluation-criteria cases are answered/refused at the field level, while the official-contact boundary control remains answerable.
The report trail repeatedly marks qv8-only evidence as diagnostic or source-exposed and keeps strict scoreboard references separate, including L37 EDD 86.25.
